name: @mdwrk/lander-react-structured-data
description: Reusable React JSON-LD wrappers and schema-intent rendering for portable product landers.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @mdwrk/structured-data && npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-core && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @mdwrk/structured-data && npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-core && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json
scripts.test: npm run build && node --test tests/intent-registry-t0.test.mjs tests/intent-registry-t1.test.mjs tests/intent-registry-t2.test.mjs && node tests/run-smoke.mjs

author: Jacob Stewart <jacob@swarmauri.com>
